title: SolverMOTD
body:
[![FyrxLab Server Invite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/872bd66ffb373091ac642dd73db3813f42563f7c.png)](https://discord.gg/qe6cxbfW8s)
![SolverMotd Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b306eaa17a4ce31f56d52225cc9dd93143aac359.png)
![Intro](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45617eb59d3b01f43640cad0b944c8411abbc531.png)

**SolverMOTD** is a plugin for Spigot servers that allows server owners to display a customized welcome message (MOTD) with a uniform format. The plugin supports color codes, dynamic placeholders through PlaceholderAPI, and **MiniMessage** formatting.

Server administrators can use features like hot reload to change the MOTD without restarting the server. It supports placeholders like %server_online%, %time%, and more, making server list customization simple and flexible.

SolverMOTD provides a centralized configuration, with easy-to-use commands. The plugin offers straightforward customization for Minecraft server owners looking to personalize their server's first impression.

![installation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/426b0763c4487a7f27a7991fe6c4dedea43e835e.png)
![InstallAndSetup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20c18118536913d83eeb0637deab6ea0531348ba.png)

![config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97e5aed6a9ed1c3e8f20ffc538658332d1cab8c0.png)

```yaml
# в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•— в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•— в–Ҳв–Ҳв•—     в–Ҳв–Ҳв•—   в–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—
# в–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•җв•җв•җв•қв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•җв•җв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘     в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘   в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•җв•җв•җв•қв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•җв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—
# в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘   в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘     в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘   в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—  в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•қ
# в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘   в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘     в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘   в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•җв•қ  в–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•җв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—
# в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘в•ҡв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•қв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в•ҡв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•қв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘  в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘
# в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қ в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қ в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қ в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қ в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қв•ҡв•җв•қ  в•ҡв•җв•қ
## в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ TEMPLATES в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ ##
## These are templates that you can use as your server's MOTD,
## make sure to customize them as best suits your community.
## Template 1:
## motd:
##   line1: "В§r   В§6В§lSolverCraftВ§r В§6В§lNetworkВ§8В§l В§8в”ғв”ғ В§bВ§lSKYBLOCK В§fВ§lUPDATEВ§r"
##   line2: "В§e   exampleВ§l.В§ecom В§71.8-1.21 В§8в”ғв”ғ В§fInfo: В§7jeamВ§l.В§7one/solvermotd"
## Template 2:
## motd:
##   line1: "В§r       В§6В§lSOLVERCRAВ§eВ§lFT NEВ§6В§lTWORK В§8(В§71.8 - 1.21В§8)В§r"
##   line2: "В§r           В§6В§lВЎBOXPVP! В§7Available В§fNow!В§7."
## Template 3:
## motd:
##   line1: "В§f        гҖҺВ§l SOLVERВ§eВ§lCRAFTВ§e гҖҸВ§6В§l(В§e1.8 - 1.21.xВ§6В§l)В§r"
##   line2: "          В§aВ§lВ§nВЎCOME MAKE GREAT FRIENDS!"

motd:
  line1: <color:#ffe45e>SolverMOTD</color> Best Motd Plugin
  line2: '<yellow><gradient:#5e4fa2:#f79459>Edit your Config.yml File!</gradient>!'

use_papi: true
use_minimessage: true

```

    
## Commands

    /smotd reload: Reloads the plugin's configuration.

    /smotd help: Displays the list of available commands.

## Permissions

    solvermotd.reload: Allows the use of /smotd reload.
